text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Time flies by as I enjoy my trial period as Tamamo Cross's trainer.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Phew... Well? How was that lap?
choice_data_list: You beat your best time again!
You beat your best time again!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Aw yes! And I'm not tired at all! Lookin' good, me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems our hard days of training are paying off, and she's feeling
herself get stronger. But before the tryouts, I want to try one more
thing.
choice_data_list: How about testing your skills in a scrimmage?
How about testing your skills in a scrimmage?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: A li'l test before the real deal, yeah? Good idea! I wanna see what I'm really made of!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Considering her growth, she should have this in the bag, but we can
still use this opportunity to refine her form and strategy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Or, at least, that was the plan.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Gotta win, gotta win, gotta win! If I don't, I'm just a...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's the final stretch, with our lead still setting the pace! Will anyone
be able to overtake her?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: No! Why?! C'mon, legs, don't give up on me now! We gotta do dis!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross speeds up, but she can't pass the lead! Has she run out
of energy?! The lead remains the same and... we have a winner!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What was supposed to be an easy warm-up before the real deal turns
out to be a fight to even place fifth...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: What the hell... Why, after all that work, am I still garbage?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Sorry, but I'm callin' it a day. I needa cool off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to take a walk. As I stroll about, I try to figure out the reason
behind Tamamo Cross's inability to unleash her strength during that
last race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I look up, I realize I'm in the same park where I met Tamamo Cross.
And just like that time, I can hear the sound of children playing.

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Over here, Tama!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Hurry, hurry!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Geez, I didn't come here to play, ya know. You're all lucky you're
adorable. Can't say no to—

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I guess. This park reminds me of the one near my house back home.
So when I'm down in the dumps, I'll come here to clear my head.

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Tama? Whatcha doing?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Gimme a minute, guys—we're havin' a chat over here! Go on, have fun
without me!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...The kids here are around the same age as my siblings.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I wonder how the little scoundrels are doin'... Same goes for my
folks... Hope they're holdin' up okay.
choice_data_list: Sounds like family's important to you.
Sounds like family's important to you.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yeah... More than anythin'.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
If I'm bein' honest, we're not exactly swimmin' in money, but that
didn't matter to us. Everyone was always smiling, and every day was a
blast.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Thing is... supportin' us costs money, so Mom and Dad work
themselves to the bone every day... I couldn't just sit around and let
them handle everythin'.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Brother
text_block_list.text: Hey, Tama! Let's buy some candy! I'm super hungry right now!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, ya know we can't afford it. 'Sides, tonight's dinner is... grilled
fish cakes! You sure you wanna fill up on sweets?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Sister
text_block_list.text: Wow! Tama's makin' grilled fish cakes?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Brother
text_block_list.text: All right! You're right, Tama. I gotta save room!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That's what I like to hear! Now let's get goin'. Mom and Dad are
waitin' for us back home!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: (Just you wait, kiddos. Someday I'll buy you as much candy as you want, and we'll be chowin' down on grilled steaks for dinner!)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
After that, I got to thinkin' up ways I could make my family's dreams
come true. And eventually I landed on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: If I can win all the races, I'll be super famous, right? And with that comes cash. After that, I'll be able to buy whatever my family wants!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
My folks worked hard to get me into this academy, so I gotta make it
worth the price! That's why I gotta win! But...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: With my crappy runnin', not only am I losin', but I'm losing bad. I gotta admit it's a li'l... frustratin'.

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: ...Tama? What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Whatcha doin' here, ya little rascals? I thought I told youse guys
to go play.

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: But we wanna see you run! Show us how fast you are!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
For cryin' out loud... You just think of me as a toy, don'tcha? A'ight,
but just this once. Back up, everybody!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ready, set... Hup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross blasts off with a ferocity that seems to send a crackle
through the air. Yes, just like before... she is the lightning disrupting
the evening sky.

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Whoooa! Tama, you got even faster! You were like, "BOOM!"

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Yeah! And it looks like a blast!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: It sure does, yeah?! Dat's why they call me "White Lightning!"

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Well, it started with something my dad said. He told me seein' me
zoomin' around havin' a blast was like watchin' a streak of white
lightning.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
My whole family's convinced White Lightning's gonna destroy the
competition to become the fastest in Japan... And I don't wanna
prove 'em wrong.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Could those words be the key to what's holding her back?
